notableEvents.label: Jeremiah Jackson GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Jeremiah Jackson grounds into a double play, third baseman José Tena to second baseman Nasim Nuñez to first baseman Luis García Jr. Coby Mayo out at 2nd. Jeremiah Jackson out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: 2 straight HRs
notableEvents.detail: Back-to-back (or more) homers in one game

notableEvents.label: James Wood plunked
notableEvents.detail: James Wood hit by pitch. Jacob Young to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Joey Wiemer pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Joey Wiemer reaches on a fielder's choice out, shortstop Gunnar Henderson to third baseman Coby Mayo. Keibert Ruiz out at 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Curtis Mead pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Curtis Mead pops out to catcher Adley Rutschman in foul territory.

notableEvents.label: Brady House pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Brady House doubles (7) on a ground ball to left fielder Taylor Ward. James Wood scores.

notableEvents.label: Stolen base
notableEvents.detail: Nasim Nuñez steals (19) 3rd base. Keibert Ruiz steals (1) 2nd base.

notableEvents.label: Joey Wiemer pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Joey Wiemer reaches on a fielder's choice out, third baseman Coby Mayo to catcher Adley Rutschman. Nasim Nuñez out at home.
